untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a multi-leg spread calculation (GPM = 0.022 × Soybean meal + 11 × Soybean oil − Soybeans) across three separate commodity contracts with different units ($/ton, $/pound, $/bushel). The allowed indicator set does not include spread-based composite indicators or multi-leg synthetic pricing. No single price series (close) can represent the GPM formula. Additionally, the exact GPM threshold for entry is marked 'AUTHOR_SILENT' and cannot be determined. This requires external data normalization and cross-contract correlation not supported by the standard indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a reverse crush spread (short soybeans, long meal and oil) executed when GPM falls below crush costs. The GPM formula is a synthetic indicator combining three different commodity prices with specific weightings. Without explicit threshold values and the ability to construct multi-leg spreads, this signal cannot be accurately represented in the backtest engine. Recommend: (1) pre-calculate GPM as an external data feed, (2) supply explicit threshold value, (3) or implement a custom spread indicator handler.
